text:
AlienVault OTX Threat Intelligence Pulse: Emotet Malware Campaign
Author: OTX Community
Adversaries: Emotet Botnet
Threat Indicators: 2 IOCs included

Description: Emotet is a modular banking trojan that has been active since 2014. It can be used as a loader for other malware. Recently observed spreading via malicious Office documents.
name: Emotet Malware Campaign
author: OTX Community

text:
AlienVault OTX Threat Intelligence Pulse: APT28 Infrastructure
Author: OTX Community
Adversaries: APT28
Threat Indicators: 1 IOCs included

Description: This pulse contains indicators of compromise associated with APT28, a sophisticated threat actor attributed to Russian military intelligence.
name: APT28 Infrastructure
author: OTX Community
